title: Venezuelan Midnight Bake
description: A rich, moist dessert inspired by the flavors of Venezuela. Perfect for warm nights or midnight cravings.
instructions: Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish and set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together flour and sugar.
In a large mixing bowl, cream together butter and eggs.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
